(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 3): b2, b3, b4 (b2 on table, b3 on b2, b4 on b3)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 5): b5, b6, b7, b8, b9 (b5 on table, b6 on b5, ..., b9 on b8)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 8): b10, b11, b12, b13, b14, b15, b16, b17 (b10 on table, ..., b17 on b16)
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (clear b17)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (but it's alone, so no change needed)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b4 on table, b3 on b4, b2 on b3
      (on-table b4)
      (on b3 b4)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b9 on table, b8 on b9, b7 on b8, b6 on b7, b5 on b6
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (clear b5)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b17 on table, b16 on b17, b15 on b16, b14 on b15, b13 on b14, b12 on b13, b11 on b12, b10 on b11
      (on-table b17)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at the end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)
